Coronavirus deaths by week-ending date 
NOTE: Number of deaths reported on this page are the total number of deaths received 
and coded as of the date of analysis and do not represent all deaths that occurred in that period. Data are 
incomplete because of the lag in time between when the death occurred and when the death certificate is 
completed, submitted to NCHS and processed for reporting purposes. This delay can range from 1 week to 8 weeks 
or more, depending on the jurisdiction and cause of death. Data for New York excludes New York City. Data from 
2015-2019 are based on final data and data from 2020-2026 are provisional. Data are presented with a 2-week lag.
